titleStmt.title: SII 34.302: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 302. Tiruvaranguḷam, Alangudi Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the west wall of the old kitchen in the first prākāra in the Haratīrthēśvara temple.

summary.p: The agambaḍi-mudali Bhuvanasiṅgadēvaṉ fixed the rates to be collected towards the levy taḍikuṟuṇi (literally one kuṟuṇi per field) in all the tirunāmattukkāṇi and dēvadāna villages of the temple. The proceeds had to be utilized towards offerings and ten lamps for the merit of his overlord Chēmappiḷḷaiyār.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tiripuvaṉa cakkaravattikaḷ ciri vīrapāṇṭiya tēvaṟkku yāṇṭu pattāvatu Uṭaiyār tiruvarankuḷamuṭaiya nāyanārkku nāyanār cēma
ppiḷḷaiyar Akampaṭi mutalikaḷḷilil Utaiyan puvaṉa ciṅka tēvaṉnēn Innāyanār tēvatāna Āna tirunāmattukkāṇi Āna nīrnilaṅkaḷūm
puncekaḷum kuṭinīṅkā tēvatānamāṉa nīrnilaṅkaḷum puṉcekaḷum nāyanār cīpaṇṭārattil vilaikoṇṭa cēman kuḻi paṟṟāṉa nīr ni
laṅkaḷum puncekaḷḷum perunelkiḷicōḻa nāṭāḻvān kuṭikāṭum nāyanār tiruviḷammāy Aruḷiya Aracakaṇṭarāman canti nāḷaikku kavira
nāṭṭu nāṭṭārai Iṭuvittu nān kalveṭṭivittu kuṭutta kuḷattūrrāṉa Aḻakiya cēma nallūr nīr nilaṅkaḷḷum Innāyanār tirunāmattu
kkāṇiyāna kūṭallūrum kumpaṭakku nallūrum ka va nāṭṭu Ū tēvatāṉaṅkaḷum Ippaṭiyil vaṉta tēvatānaṅkaḷ In
nāyanār kōil cīkāriyam ceyvārkaḷ koḷḷum taṭi kuṟuṇi koḷum miṭattu nīr nilaṅkaḷukku taṭi Onṟukku Aṟukkum naṟukkuṟuṇiyum Aṭi
kkum naṟukuṟuṇiyum ninṟa nāḷḷil vantatu koḷḷa kaṭavatākavum puñceyyirukkum Eḷḷum koḷḷuttuvarai Uḷḷiṭṭa payiṟṟu
kku ninṟa nāḷtōṟum kuṟuṇi peṟa kaṭavatākavum puñceyil tuvarai varaku pullu keṇṭi Uḷḷiṭṭa payaṟṟukku ninṟa nāḷ Onṟukku patak
kāka vantatu peṟa kaṭavatākavum Ippaṭiyāl cīkāriyañ ceyvarkaḷ koḷḷavu m kaṅkāṇi varai mutal koṇṭu nāyanār cē
mappiḷḷaiyār tirumēnikku nanṟāka tiruppaḷḷi Eḻucci cannatikku Amutupaṭi nāḷonṟu(ṟu)kku
ceppu nāḻiyāl kuṟuṇi Arucikkum viñcaṉattukku muppatu tiruviḷakkum cantirā
titavaṟ cella kaṭavataāka kalveṭṭikkuṭuttēn puvanciṅka tēvannēn Ippaṭikku
puvanaciṅka tēvar kaṇakku Ātiṉūr Uṭaiyāṉ Ulaku Uyyakoṇṭān Aḻakan
Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 34.302 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
